entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop studied for its response to temperature and water stress

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: The condition of limited water availability in the soil

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The air temperature levels (25, 28, and 31 °C) applied to the plants

entities.name: CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENT GLASSHOUSES
entities.description: The environment where the groundnut plants were grown under controlled conditions

entities.name: PLANT WATER STATUS
entities.description: The overall water condition of the plant, including leaf water and turgor potential

entities.name: STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The rate of gas exchange through the stomata of the leaves

entities.name: WATER USE
entities.description: The total amount of water consumed by the groundnut stands

entities.name: LEAF WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: The potential of water in the leaf, denoted as Ψ1

entities.name: TURGOR POTENTIAL
entities.description: The pressure exerted by the cell contents against the cell wall, denoted as Ψp

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of total upper leaf surface to the surface area of the land, denoted as LAI

entities.name: CANOPY CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The overall conductance of the plant canopy

entities.name: LEAF TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature of the leaves, which increases under water stress

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water is evaporated from the leaves

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the non-reproductive parts of the plant

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The total yield of pods produced by the plant

entities.name: POD-FILLING
entities.description: The physiological process of filling the pods with seeds

entities.name: VAPOUR PRESSURE DIFFERENCE
entities.description: The difference in vapour pressure between the leaf surface and the surrounding air
